title: Brotein Supabase schema — full table list
html:
Supabase Table Editor for Brotein (public schema) — 13 tables: access_codes, access_redemptions, api_rate_limits, creator_attributions, daily_quotes, food_categories, food_items, friendships, invites, profiles, protein_logs, restaurant_items, restaurants, user_stats, users. Most marked Unrestricted (no RLS).

TL;DR

  • Brotein backend schema: foods + restaurants + protein logs + social graph (friendships/invites/crews) + creator-attribution / access-code system on top of Supabase.
  • creator_attributions + access_codes/access_redemptions confirm a referral/creator-code growth surface — not just gym-bro UX.
  • "Unrestricted" on most tables = no RLS yet → security debt to fix before the public launch.

brotein · supabase · brotein data model · anabolic scoring · creator attribution
